name: Pumpernickel Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, dissolve the yeast in the warm water.
3. Add the butter, sugar, and molasses; mix well.
4. Stir in the caraway seeds, mashed potatoes, melted chocolate, rye flour, whole wheat flour, cornmeal, and additional flour. Mix until combined.
5. Form the dough into a smooth ball. Grease a bowl and turn the dough inside, covering with plastic wrap.
6. Allow the dough to rise for 1¼ hours or until doubled in size.
7. Flour a work surface and turn the dough out onto it. Gently press down on the dough to release any gases.
8. Flatten the dough into a circle about 1 inch thick. Cut into pieces, forming each piece into a roll about 3 inches in diameter.
9. Place rolls on a parchment-lined baking sheet. Brush with egg wash and sprinkle with poppy seeds.
10. Bake for 25 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from oven and let cool.
Yield: 18 rolls
